name: freshcart-grocery-delivery
description: Full-stack grocery delivery platform with customer ordering, admin management, delivery workflows, Stripe payments, and email OTP verification.

scripts.build: npm --prefix client ci && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.verify: npm --prefix client run lint -- --max-warnings 0 && npm --prefix client run test && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix server test
